All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AttachmentDAOImpl
Implementation class for Attachment DAO operations.
AttachmentDAOInt
DAO interface for Attachment entity operations.
AttachmentDTO
DTO class representing Attachment entity.
AttachmentServiceImpl
Implementation class for Attachment service operations.
AttachmentServiceInt
Service interface for Attachment operations.
BaseCtl<F extends BaseForm,T extends BaseDTO,S extends BaseServiceInt<T>>
Generic Base Controller providing common REST APIs like save, get, search, and delete for all entities.
BaseDAOImpl<T extends BaseDTO>
Generic JPA implementation of BaseDAOInt.
BaseDAOInt<T extends BaseDTO>
Generic DAO interface providing basic CRUD operations and search functionality for all DTO entities.
BaseDTO
Base entity class for all DTOs.
BaseForm
Base form class used for transferring data between UI and backend.
BaseServiceImpl<T extends BaseDTO,D extends BaseDAOInt<T>>
Generic service implementation providing common business logic for all entities using BaseDAO.
BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>
Generic service interface providing business operations for all DTO entities.
ChangePasswordForm
Form class for changing user password.

JWTRequestFilter
JWT authentication filter that executes once per request.

Custom UserDetailsService implementation for JWT authentication.

Utility class for creating, validating, and parsing JWT tokens.
LoginCtl
Controller for authentication-related operations.
LoginForm
Form class for user login.
